reference: Hello, your symptoms are more indicative of a muscle sprain, especially of the trapezius muscle, as your shoulder and clavicle have started paining suddenly. You need analgesics and good physiotherapy, but before that, a magnetic resonance imaging of the shoulder joint can be helpful.
text: Hello, your symptoms are more indicative of a muscle sprain, especially of the trapezius muscle, as your shoulder and clavicle have started paining suddenly. You need analgesics and good physiotherapy, but before that, a magnetic resonance imaging of the shoulder joint can be helpful.
